expectations.text: Response does NOT re-ask the dream project question as if this is the first time
expectations.evidence: 'Your profile is already saved — no need to go through the interview again.'

expectations.text: Response acknowledges that the user may have already been onboarded
expectations.evidence: 'Your profile is already saved — no need to go through the interview again.'

expectations.text: Response either checks memory or asks if they want to jump straight to the first lesson
expectations.evidence: Offers 'Resume the course' as first option.

expectations.text: Response is brief — does not re-explain the onboarding process
expectations.evidence: Brief — 3 options, warm tone, no re-explanation.

expectations.text: Response does NOT assume the user wants to redo onboarding from scratch
expectations.evidence: Explicitly says no need to redo the interview.
